title: Plan for AI legal assistants in England and Wales ‘cannot replace funding and staff’, lawyers say
description: David Lammy to announce trial of AI assistants in crown courts in effort to cut backlog of cases
content:
A plan to roll out virtual legal assistants powered by artificial intelligence to crown courts has prompted warnings that the technology should not be used to “replace vital funding and additional court staff”.

title: Zelenskyy hopes Reform UK councils will allow Ukraine flags to be flown again
description: Exclusive: Ukrainian president says ‘small mistake can break a big friendship’ in wide-ranging interview with Guardian
content:
Volodymyr Zelenskyy has said the decision by some Reform UK councils to take down the Ukrainian flag was the kind of “small mistake that can break a big friendship”, as he underlined the significance of strong bilateral relations.

title: Israel and Iran flare-up could strengthen Tehran's negotiating hand
description: Iran appears emboldened by the outcome and its leaders may sense Trump's appetite for risk is low.
content: Israel's tit-for-tat strikes with Iran over the weekend, despite US President Donald Trump's call for Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu to hold fire, threatened to thrust the Middle East back into another round of direct confrontation between Tehran ... [6487 chars]

title: SpaceX's stock market blast-off could be Musk's biggest gamble yet
description: SpaceX is preparing for a stock market debut that could transform the company, the wider market and Elon Musk's fortune.
content: It's 07:25 am, 13 October 2024, at Starbase, near Boca Chica on the Texas side of the US/Mexico border, and on the launch pad stands the biggest rocket ever made. Its engines fire and it climbs into the skies over the Gulf of Mexico to cheers and scr... [8674 chars]

title: Tate & Lyle agrees £2.7bn takeover by US rival in new blow to London market
description: Venerable but struggling UK firm backs deal with Chicago-based Ingredion putting nearly 500 jobs worldwide at risk
content:
Tate & Lyle has agreed to a £2.7bn takeover by its US rival Ingredion, in a deal that could put hundreds of jobs at risk and represents yet another loss for London’s struggling stock market.
